title: Place Candles Anywhere
description: Allows candles to be placed on any block, like leaves, honey and more
body:
# Place Candles Anywhere
###
Questions or issues? -> [discord server](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6) | _or create an issue on github_ ## Place candles on any block ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fde436a6724469e74204e825af6e5d047e9a069d.png) ## How it works - Any block is supported, you can just place the candle on the block - If you place a candle on the side of a block, it will float in the air
